task_completion.description: Open StudioTax 2024 and initiate a return for Jordan MacNeil.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax 2024 application window is open, and the taxpayer information section or active return tab displays the name 'Jordan MacNeil'.

task_completion.description: Access the provided tax documents for the taxpayer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer or document viewer window is open showing files located in 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\macneil\'.

task_completion.description: Report USD AdSense revenue and US withholding tax converted to CAD.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax forms (such as Form T2125 or Foreign Tax Credit forms) showing entries for foreign income and foreign tax paid, representing the AdSense revenue and withholding tax.

task_completion.description: Complete Form T2125 with T4A sponsorship income.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Form T2125 (Statement of Business or Professional Activities) is visible in StudioTax, with income entries specifically reflecting sponsorship income derived from a T4A slip.

task_completion.description: Apply Capital Cost Allowance (CCA) across different asset classes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CCA schedule (Area A of Form T2125) is visible in StudioTax, showing additions or calculations for multiple different CCA classes.

task_completion.description: Save the completed return as 'jordan_macneil.24t' in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box or the StudioTax title bar shows the file being saved as 'jordan_macneil.24t' in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the StudioTax 2024 graphical user interface to complete the return.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through the StudioTax 2024 menus and forms, rather than generating the .24t file via terminal commands, scripts, or text editors.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually opened and viewed the source tax documents.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the agent opening the PDFs or document files in the 'TaxDocuments\macneil' folder to read the values, rather than magically knowing the amounts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent manually entered the tax data into the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should capture the agent typing or pasting values into the specific fields of Form T2125 and other relevant StudioTax forms.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Taxpayer Name: Jordan MacNeil. Occupation: Digital Content Creator / YouTuber. Output File: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\jordan_macneil.24t. Relevant CRA guidelines: CRA Guide T4002 (Business and Professional Income) and CRA Folio S5-F2-C1 (Foreign Tax Credit).
